query: What are the names of lakes situated in countries through which the Natara River flows, with an area of less than 390,000 square kilometers?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Lake)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:flowsThrough]-(m1:River {name: 'Natara'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.area_km2 < 390000 RETURN n.name

query: What are the names of all countries?

query: What are the positions played by players who have been part of the Portland Trail Blazers, and how many players have played each position?

query: What are the unique filming locations for movies that were both released in and originated from the same country?

query: Which companies had Charles Prince as a board member during the year 2006?

query: What are the names and lengths in kilometers of rivers that pass through Myanmar and has the Mun River as a tributary?

query: How many players have either received the NBA All-Star Game Kobe Bryant Most Valuable Player Award or have played for the Golden State Warriors at some point?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:Player)-[r0:receivesAward]->(m0:Award {name: 'NBA All-Star Game Kobe Bryant Most Valuable Player Award'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Player)-[r1:playsFor]->(m1:Team {name: 'Golden State Warriors'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

query: What are the names of the production companies by which the movie 'Life is Beautiful' is produced?

query: What is the lowest elevation of mountains located in Nepal?

gold_cypher: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:locatedIn]-(m1:Lake {name: 'Keller Lake'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.area_km2 DESC

query: What is the name of the tallest mountain that is part of a mountain range which the Saser Muztagh mountain range is part of?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Mountain)-[r0:partOf]->(m0:MountainRange)<-[r1:partOf]-(m1:MountainRange {name: 'Saser Muztagh'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.elevation_m DESC LIMIT 1

query: How many distinct locations are organizations based in?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Location)<-[r0:basedIn]-(m0:Organization) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(DISTINCT n)

query: What are the names of drainage basins that the Lukaya River or Lake Mweru are part of?
gold_cypher: CALL { MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r0:partOf]-(m0:River {name: 'Lukaya River'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r1:partOf]-(m1:Lake {name: 'Lake Mweru'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

query: Provide the names of all players who play the swingman position, along with the number of awards each has received.
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Player)-[r1:playsPosition]->(m1:Position {name: 'swingman'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Player)-[r0:receivesAward]->(m0:Award) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

query: What are the names and ICAO codes of the airports from which West Caribbean Airways Flight 9955 departed?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Airport)<-[r0:departsFrom]-(m0:FlightAccident {name: 'West Caribbean Airways Flight 9955'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.icao_code

query: What is the latest launch year among companies that have had a board member at any time?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Company)-[r0:hasBoardMember]->(m0:Person) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN max(n.launch_year)

query: What is Ho Yi's gender?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Person {name: 'Ho Yi'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.gender

query: What are the names of production companies that have produced movies released in Madagascar?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:ProductionCompany)<-[r0:producedBy]-(m0:Movie)-[r1:releasedIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'Madagascar'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

query: What are the names of movies featuring Quentin Tarantino, and how many writers does each of these movies have?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:Movie)-[r1:hasCastMember]->(m1:Person {name: 'Quentin Tarantino'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:Movie)-[r0:writtenBy]->(m0:Person) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

query: What are the names of drainage basins that have lakes located in the People's Republic of China as part of them?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r0:partOf]-(m0:Lake)-[r1:locatedIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'People\'s Republic of China'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

query: What are the names of aviation accidents that were headed to the same airport from which Avianca Flight 671 departed, occurring after June 24th, 1975?
gold_cypher: MATCH (n:FlightAccident)-[r0:destinedFor]->(m0:Airport)<-[r1:departsFrom]-(m1:FlightAccident {name: 'Avianca Flight 671'}) WITH DISTINCT n WHERE n.date > date('1975-06-24') RETURN n.name
